ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer leading the event */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., in-person, virtual, hybrid) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for users to register for the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue (e.g., on campus, off campus) */,
  "map" TEXT /* Map or directions to the venue */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue (e.g., projector, whiteboard) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trainer belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the trainer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the trainer based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of events of this type (in minutes) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with events of this type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attendee, trainer, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred event types, preferred venues) */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to receive notifications for events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., attended, absent) */,
  "rsvp_status" TEXT /* RSVP status of the user (e.g., yes, no, maybe) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user for the event */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the event (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
